name: noriq
description: AI-native project management — MCP coordination layer for agents, web app for humans

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @noriq-dev/shared && npm run build --workspace @noriq-dev/web
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy --workspace @noriq-dev/api
scripts.deploy:demo: npm run build && npm run deploy:demo --workspace @noriq-dev/api
